description: Composition Green round neck T-shirt with a snipped edged neckline made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves with fold over cuffs and graphic print on the front Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach, wring or tumble dry Flat dry in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations Show your love for the brand with this stylish T-shirt from lee. The graphic print adds to your femininity while the soft cotton fabric will keep you fresh all day. Pair this tee with denims and slip-on shoes for a girlie look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
